_note: HOUSE OF ESAU / EDOM & THE HORITES OF SEIR — completing Genesis 36 for the ~1900-1800 BC generation. IMPORTANT: most of the house of Esau was ALREADY built in 07_biblical.json and is only REFERENCED here, never recreated: ESAU; his three wives ADAH (dau. of ELON the Hittite, Gen 36:2), OHOLIBAMAH (dau. of ANAH, gr-dau. of ZIBEON, Gen 36:2) and BASEMATH (dau. of ISHMAEL, sister of Nebaioth, Gen 36:3 = Mahalath of Gen 28:9, linked to ISHMAEL in 07c_kin); his sons ELIPHAZ, REUEL, JEUSH, JALAM, KORAH (Gen 36:4-5); Eliphaz's sons TEMAN, OMAR, ZEPHO, GATAM, KENAZE and AMALEK by the concubine TIMNA (Gen 36:11-12); Reuel's sons NAHATH, ZERAHEDOM, SHAMMAH, MIZZAH (Gen 36:13); the Horite chief SEIRHORITE with son ZIBEON, grandson ANAH, gr-gr-dau. OHOLIBAMAH; and the later kings of Edom KEDOM_* (Gen 36:31-39). The Hittite (Elon) and Hivite/Horite (Zibeon) parentage of Esau's wives therefore already exists. This file adds only what Gen 36 still leaves unbuilt: (A) the rest of the seven sons of Seir the Horite (Gen 36:20-21) — Lotan, Shobal, Anah, Dishon, Ezer, Dishan (Zibeon already built), plus Lotan's sister TIMNA referenced onto this union so Eliphaz's concubine gains her Horite parentage (Timna sister of Lotan, 1 Chron 1:39; the identification of the two Timnas is the traditional reading). NOTE the two-Anah / two-Dishon crux of Gen 36: the Anah 'who found the hot springs' (36:24) is the son of ZIBEON (the existing ANAH, correctly placed) — distinct from ANAH_SEIR, the Anah listed among Seir's own sons (36:20); likewise Dishon appears both as a son of Seir (DISHON_SEIR, the chief, 36:21) and as a son of Anah (DISHON_ANAH, brother of Oholibamah, 36:25). (B) the Horite sub-lines of Gen 36:22-28: Lotan's sons Hori & Hemam; Shobal's sons Alvan, Manahath, Ebal, Shepho, Onam; Zibeon's other son Aiah (Anah already built); Anah's son Dishon; Dishon-son-of-Seir's sons Hemdan, Eshban, Ithran, Cheran; Ezer's sons Bilhan, Zaavan, Akan; Dishan's sons Uz & Aran. (C) KORAH_ELIPHAZ, listed as a chief descended from Eliphaz in Gen 36:16 though absent from the son-list of 36:11 (a duplicate the Samaritan Pentateuch omits) — added and flagged, distinct from Korah son of Esau. Ids namespaced where a name recurs elsewhere in scripture: ANAH_SEIR, DISHON_SEIR, DISHON_ANAH, UZ_HORITE (vs Uz son of Nahor/Shem), KORAH_ELIPHAZ. Sorts after 07/11 so all referenced parents (SEIRHORITE, ZIBEON, ANAH, ELIPHAZ, TIMNA) already exist; new parents are defined before they are reused.
